title: neobartsia flava subsp. minor
intro: Neobartsia flava subsp. minor, also known as the yellow fringe-petale, is a flowering plant species within the Orobanchaceae family, characterized by its yellow-colored flowers and fringed petals. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, primarily due to its alkaloid content, which has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and gastrointestinal problems. The health benefits of Neobartsia flava subsp. minor include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of conditions such as arthritis and infections. Herbal preparations of this plant, often in the form of infusions or decoctions, have been used in traditional medicine to promote digestive health and combat respiratory issues.
